name: Creamy Carrot Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, cook carrots just until crisp-tender.
2. Drain the carrots and reserve 1/4 cup of the cooking liquid.
3. Place the carrots in a 1-1/2 quart baking dish.
4. Combine the mayonnaise, onion, horseradish, and reserved cooking liquid in a bowl.
5. Spread the mixture evenly over the carrots.
6. Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese on top.
7. Top with buttered bread crumbs.
8. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 30 minutes.
